title: Pup GO 8 Pack Travel Size Classic 4 in a Row Game for Kids Ages 3+, Pocket Size Board Game for Car,Airplane & Camping, Travel Essential 2 Player Strategy Kids Games, Foldable (11x8cm/4.33x3.15inches)
features: 🟢🔵【Ideal Fun Family Board games】 Mini 4 in a Row is a classic board games for kids ages 3 +. Set up in seconds with simple rules, play our Connect & Win 4 in a Row board games with family and friends to create wonderful memories. Enjoy your time together.

🟢🔵【Educational Effects】-Four in a Row board games builds children's STEM skills in pattern recognition, strategic planning, and spatial reasoning. Perfect kids board games and childrens board games to balance learning and fun.
🟢🔵【Mini Travel Size & Portable】11x8cm / 4.3x3.1inches pocket size, same exciting gameplay, now easier to take. Fits pockets effortlessly for instant play anytime &anywhere.
🟢🔵【Child-Safe Materials & Durable Quality】2 colours options avaliable-Bule & Green. All our products are tested to the highest CE standard to ensure the safety of your children.

🟢🔵【The Excellent Gift for every Moment】Ideal for birthday present, school surprises, garden parties, home gatherings or any outdoor activities. Great as board games for 6+ year olds, bringing laughter to any celebration.
description: Features Enjoy endless fun with this traditional game, perfect for the whole family. The simple gameplay is easy for even young children to understand, ensuring they stay engaged and entertained. In fact, most kids can quickly improve their skills and enjoy playing more. Classic Travel-Sized Board Game Designed for travel, this folding board game is both compact and portable. When folded, it measures just 11cm x 8cm, making it easy to slip into your pocket and play anytime, anywhere! Ideal for flights, long train journeys, or car trips, this travel-sized Four in a Row game is your perfect companion. How to Play 1. Slide the game board halfway across the base, raise it upright, and gently push down until it clicks into place. 2. Each player selects a set of colored chips and takes turns dropping one into the column of their choice. 3. The winner is the first player to align four of their chips in a row, either vertically, horizontally, or diagonally. 4. When the game is finished, lift and tilt the vertical game board to release the chips and start a new game. Specifications Number of Players: 2 Materials: Non-toxic ABS Plastic Dimensions Open Size: 11 x 8 x 9 cm / 4.3 x 3.1 x 3.5 in Dimensions Folded Size: 11 x 8 x 2 cm / 4.3 x 3.1 x 0.8 in Disc Diameter: 1.2 cm / 0.5 in Weight: 45 g / 0.1 lb Package Includes 1 x Collapsible Game Board 21 x Red Discs 21 x Yellow Discs 100% Satisfaction Guaranteed! Experience the joy of a timeless classic with our travel-sized Four in a Row game. Perfect for on-the-go fun, it promises to keep players of all ages entertained and challenged. Enjoy the satisfaction of quality and convenience, guaranteed!
